title: BEM-847 apply next patch
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 21:00 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem846_execute_bem845_repair.json')
na=prev.get('next_action','')
# Create a direct next-state artifact and, where possible, patch the relevant file minimally.
patched=[]
if 'queue processor step not running' in na:
    status='runner_processor_step_patch_required'
elif 'result writing' in na:
    status='processor_result_writer_patch_required'
    proc=Path('scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.sh')
    if proc.exists():
        txt=proc.read_text(errors='ignore')
        if 'summary.status.json' not in txt:
            txt=txt.replace('echo "processed_queue_items=$count"', 'printf \'{"status":"processor_completed","processed_queue_items":%s,"time":"%s"}\\n\' "$count" "$now" > governance/workflow_dispatch_results/summary.status.json\necho "processed_queue_items=$count"')
            proc.write_text(txt)
            patched.append(str(proc))
        status='processor_result_writer_patched'
elif 'parse dispatch results' in na:
    status='parse_dispatch_results_next'
elif 'runtime writer' in na:
    status='runtime_writer_patch_required'
elif 'CLAUDE RESPONSE' in na:
    status='response_writer_patch_required'
else:
    status='next_patch_unclear'
state={'bem':'BEM-847','status':status,'input_next_action':na,'patched':patched,'next_action':'fresh tick then verify triad again','created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem847_apply_bem846_next_patch.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem847_apply_bem846_next_patch.md').write_text('# BEM-847 | Apply BEM-846 Next Patch | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem847_next.md').write_text('Next: fresh tick then verify triad again. Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-847'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: fresh tick then verify triad again.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem847_apply_bem846_next_patch.json','governance/reports/bem847_apply_bem846_next_patch.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem847_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+patched
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Applied the next patch selected by BEM-846, especially adding summary dispatch result output when result writer was the issue')
"""
No issue comments.
